definitions.text: An irregular line left from smearing or motion.
examples: The picture I took out the car window had streaks.

definitions.text: A continuous series of like events.
examples: I hope I can keep up this streak of accomplishments.
I was on a winning streak until the fourth game, when I was dealt terrible cards.

definitions.text: A measure of activity that tracks how many consecutive days a certain interaction with another user or a service has taken place, a form of gamification to drive user engagement.

examples: If you clean a window in direct sunlight, it will streak.
It was a pleasant game until some guy went streaking across the field.
